name: Data Protection & Privacy
description: DPIA workflow under Regulation (EU) 2018/1725 (EUDPR). Covers DPO oversight, IT architecture description, security threat modelling, legal basis assessment, and EDPS prior consultation determination for EU institutions, bodies, offices, and agencies.

skills.description: Personalise this plugin to your DG, processing activity, and working language
Full DPIA under Art. 39 EUDPR — multi-agent: DPO, IT-PM, IT Security, Legal Officer, EDPS prior-consultation determination
DPO persona — Art. 39 threshold screening, risk sign-off, register of processing activities, Art. 40 referral decision
IT Project Manager — system architecture, data flows, third-party processors, ROPA record, retention schedule
IT Security Officer — CIA threat model, TIA for non-EU cloud/AI providers, security measures, residual risk rating
Legal Officer (data protection) — legal basis Art. 5(1) EUDPR, necessity, proportionality, special categories, retention justification
IT Security Plans Expert — ISP drafting, ISO 27001/CIS Controls mapping, risk register, incident response procedure, NIS2 compliance check
Data Breach Response Officer — breach assessment, 72-hour EDPS notification (Art. 34 EUDPR), data subject communication (Art. 35), breach register
RoPA Drafter — Art. 31 EUDPR Record of Processing Activities, legal basis, retention schedule, processor register, DPIA threshold flag
AI Act Compliance Officer — risk tier classification, prohibited practice check, FRIA (Art. 27), technical documentation, human oversight, conformity assessment
